name: prompt closed-loop step eval-to-history records the eval result in eval-history directory
command: mkdir -p prompts/eval-history/x && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/prompts/closed-loop-test.sh" --step eval-to-history --prompt-id x --version v1.0.0 --score 0.85 --history-dir prompts/eval-history --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && [ -f prompts/eval-history/x/v1.0.0.json ] && grep -q '"score":0.85' prompts/eval-history/x/v1.0.0.json && echo ok 1>&2
